caption: The video begins with a white screen featuring a black logo that reads "TFNN.COM EDUCATING INVESTORS". The scene then transitions to a man with glasses wearing a white button-down shirt, appearing in a presentation setting. He is gesturing with his hands while speaking. To his left, a screen displays a financial chart with a dark background, and to his right, a graphic titled "THE ART OF TIMING THE TRADE" is visible. Large white text overlays the center of the screen, reading "Tom O'Brien Timing The Trade All Day Webinar". As the video progresses, the screen shifts to a white background with black text detailing a webinar session. This text includes "TOM O'BRIEN TIMING THE TRADE ALL DAY SEMINAR" and "JUNE 10TH, 2022". A blue "Checkout" button is visible, followed by a schedule listing "Part 1 From 9:00 a.m. ET to Noon ET" and "Part 2 From 12:30 p.m. ET to 2:00 p.m. ET".
